phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove parte il tour per i crateri, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh PAR-teh ee toor per ee kra-TEH-ree, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Al punto incontro, vicino al bus.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL POON-toh een-KOHNT-roh vee-CHEE-noh AHL BOOS
likely_response.translation_en: At the meeting point, near the bus.

responses.english: At the meeting point, near the bus.
responses.phonetic: AHL POON-toh een-KOHNT-roh vee-CHEE-noh AHL BOOS
responses.french: Al punto incontro, vicino al bus.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora parte la funivia, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah PAR-teh la foo-nee-VEE-ah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa l'escursione guidata, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah les-koor-SYOH-neh goo-ee-DAH-tah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, i crateri sono accessibili oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ee kra-TEH-ree SOH-noh ac-ces-SEE-bee-lee OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si noleggia l'attrezzatura, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see noh-LED-jah lat-treh-tsa-TOO-rah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the shop, right here next door.

responses.english: At the shop, right here next door.
